---
title: Transfer Model Attributes to True-Shape Links
subtitle: Pseudonode dissolution → piece graph traversal → true-shape geometry assembly
description: Model links are dissolved across pseudonode chains, then each dissolved link's geometry is assembled by traversing the physical piece graph from A's snap position to B's snap position. Model attributes are transferred to the resulting true-shape LineStrings.
author:
 - name: Pukar Bhandari
   email: pukar.bhandari@wfrc.utah.gov
   affiliation:
     - name: Wasatch Front Regional Council
       url: "https://wfrc.utah.gov/"
date: "2026-05-15"
---

## Setup

### Imports

```{python}
import sys
from pathlib import Path

import geopandas as gpd
import numpy as np
import pandas as pd
from shapely.geometry import LineString
from shapely.ops import linemerge

sys.path.insert(0, str(Path.cwd()))
from _src.link_utils import assemble_chain, build_piece_graph, dissolve_pseudonodes
```

### Configuration

```{python}
# ── Filepaths ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
PATHS = {
    "in_network_links":    Path("_data/raw/WFv1000_MasterNet/WFv1000_MasterNet_20250821 - Link.shp"),
    "in_nodes_classified": Path("_data/processed/nodes_classified.gpkg"),
    "in_node_snapped":     Path("_data/processed/nodes_snapped.gpkg"),
    "in_link_pieces":      Path("_data/processed/link_pieces.gpkg"),
    "out_links_trueshape": Path("_data/processed/links_trueshape.gpkg"),
}

# ── CRS ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
CRS_UTM = "EPSG:26912"  # NAD83 UTM Zone 12N — Utah (metric)
```

---

## Load Data

### Model Links

Centroid connectors (FT=1) and non-physical HOV/Managed-Access links (FT=37,38,39) are
excluded — only links with physical road geometry and active lanes in 2027 are dissolved.

```{python}
gdf_links = gpd.read_file(
    PATHS["in_network_links"],
    where="LN_2027 > 0 AND FT_2027 NOT IN (1, 37, 38, 39)",
).to_crs(CRS_UTM)

for col in ("DIRECTION",):
    if col in gdf_links.columns:
        gdf_links[col] = gdf_links[col].str.strip()

print(f"Model links (filtered): {len(gdf_links):,} | CRS: {gdf_links.crs}")
print(f"FT_2027 distribution:\n{gdf_links['FT_2027'].value_counts().sort_index().to_string()}")
```

### Node Classification

```{python}
gdf_nodes_classified = gpd.read_file(PATHS["in_nodes_classified"])
pseudo_node_ids = set(
    gdf_nodes_classified.loc[gdf_nodes_classified["is_pseudo"].fillna(False), "N"].astype(int)
)
real_node_ids = set(
    gdf_nodes_classified.loc[~gdf_nodes_classified["is_pseudo"].fillna(False), "N"].astype(int)
)
print(f"Pseudonodes: {len(pseudo_node_ids):,} | Real nodes: {len(real_node_ids):,}")
```

### Snapped Nodes

```{python}
gdf_nodes_snapped = gpd.read_file(PATHS["in_node_snapped"], layer="nodes_snapped").to_crs(CRS_UTM)

snapped_mask = gdf_nodes_snapped["snapped"].fillna(False).astype(bool)
n_snapped = snapped_mask.sum()
print(f"Nodes: {len(gdf_nodes_snapped):,} total | {n_snapped:,} snapped ({n_snapped/len(gdf_nodes_snapped):.1%})")

# Snap coordinate lookup: N → (x_round, y_round)
node_coord_lookup: dict[int, tuple[float, float]] = {
    int(row["N"]): (float(row["snapped_x_round"]), float(row["snapped_y_round"]))
    for _, row in gdf_nodes_snapped[snapped_mask].iterrows()
}

# Model node geometry lookup: N → Point (UTM) — used for unresolved fallback
node_geom_lookup: dict[int, object] = {
    int(row["N"]): row["geometry"]
    for _, row in gdf_nodes_snapped.iterrows()
}

print(f"Snap coord lookup: {len(node_coord_lookup):,} entries")
```

### Link Pieces

```{python}
gdf_pieces = gpd.read_file(PATHS["in_link_pieces"]).to_crs(CRS_UTM)
print(f"Link pieces: {len(gdf_pieces):,} | CRS: {gdf_pieces.crs}")
```

---

## Part A — Pseudonode Dissolve

Collapse chains of model links connected through pseudonodes. Each dissolved link
spans from one real node to another; pseudonodes along the way are absorbed.

Links whose both endpoints are already real nodes appear as single-constituent chains.

```{python}
print("Dissolving pseudonodes …")
gdf_dissolved = dissolve_pseudonodes(gdf_links, pseudo_node_ids)

print(f"Original links:   {len(gdf_links):,}")
print(f"Dissolved links:  {len(gdf_dissolved):,}  ({len(gdf_links)-len(gdf_dissolved):,} fewer)")
print()
print("Constituent count distribution:")
print(gdf_dissolved["n_constituents"].value_counts().sort_index().head(10).to_string())
print()
multi = (gdf_dissolved["n_constituents"] > 1).sum()
print(f"Multi-constituent chains: {multi:,} ({multi/len(gdf_dissolved):.1%})")
```

---

## Part B — Build Piece Graph

Build a networkx Graph from the physical link pieces. Each node is labelled
`real_junction`, `pseudonode`, or `internal` based on whether it coincides
with a snapped model node and whether that node is a pseudonode.

```{python}
print("Building piece graph …")
piece_graph = build_piece_graph(gdf_pieces, gdf_nodes_snapped)

n_nodes = piece_graph.number_of_nodes()
n_edges = piece_graph.number_of_edges()
type_counts = {}
for _, attrs in piece_graph.nodes(data=True):
    t = attrs.get("node_type", "internal")
    type_counts[t] = type_counts.get(t, 0) + 1

print(f"Piece graph: {n_nodes:,} nodes | {n_edges:,} edges")
print(f"Node types:")
for t, cnt in sorted(type_counts.items()):
    print(f"  {t:20s}: {cnt:,}")
```

---

## Part C — Assemble True-Shape Chains

For each dissolved link A→B, perform a constrained BFS through the piece graph
from A's snap coordinate to B's snap coordinate. The BFS cannot traverse through
`real_junction` nodes other than B — this ensures the path stays within the
physical bounds of a single dissolved link.

```{python}
print(f"Assembling {len(gdf_dissolved):,} dissolved links …")

trueshape_geometries: list = []
trueshape_methods: list[str] = []
n_unresolved = 0
n_no_path = 0

for i, (_, row) in enumerate(gdf_dissolved.iterrows()):
    if i > 0 and i % 2000 == 0:
        print(f"  {i:,} / {len(gdf_dissolved):,} …")

    a_n, b_n = int(row["A"]), int(row["B"])
    a_coord = node_coord_lookup.get(a_n)
    b_coord = node_coord_lookup.get(b_n)

    if a_coord is None or b_coord is None:
        n_unresolved += 1
        a_pt = node_geom_lookup.get(a_n)
        b_pt = node_geom_lookup.get(b_n)
        fallback = LineString([a_pt, b_pt]) if (a_pt and b_pt) else None
        trueshape_geometries.append(fallback)
        trueshape_methods.append("unresolved_no_snap")
        continue

    pieces = assemble_chain(piece_graph, a_coord, b_coord)

    if pieces is None:
        n_no_path += 1
        a_pt = node_geom_lookup.get(a_n)
        b_pt = node_geom_lookup.get(b_n)
        fallback = LineString([a_pt, b_pt]) if (a_pt and b_pt) else None
        trueshape_geometries.append(fallback)
        trueshape_methods.append("unresolved_no_path")
    else:
        merged = linemerge(pieces) if len(pieces) > 1 else (pieces[0] if pieces else None)
        trueshape_geometries.append(merged)
        trueshape_methods.append("dissolved")

n_dissolved = trueshape_methods.count("dissolved")
print(f"\nDissolved (true-shape):  {n_dissolved:,} ({n_dissolved/len(gdf_dissolved):.1%})")
print(f"Unresolved (no snap):    {n_unresolved:,}")
print(f"Unresolved (no path):    {n_no_path:,}")
```

---

## Part D — Build Output and Export

```{python}
gdf_trueshape = gpd.GeoDataFrame(
    gdf_dissolved.assign(trueshape_method=trueshape_methods),
    geometry=trueshape_geometries,
    crs=CRS_UTM,
)

PATHS["out_links_trueshape"].parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
gdf_trueshape.to_file(PATHS["out_links_trueshape"], driver="GPKG")
print(f"Exported {len(gdf_trueshape):,} links → {PATHS['out_links_trueshape']}")
```

---

## Summary

```{python}
print("=== Stage 3 Summary ===")
print()
print(f"Input:  {len(gdf_links):,} model links (FT_2027 not in 1,37,38,39; LN_2027 > 0)")
print(f"        {len(pseudo_node_ids):,} pseudonodes dissolved")
print(f"Output: {len(gdf_trueshape):,} dissolved links → {PATHS['out_links_trueshape'].name}")
print()
print("Method breakdown:")
print(gdf_trueshape["trueshape_method"].value_counts().to_string())
print()
print("Geometry type breakdown (dissolved only):")
dissolved_mask = gdf_trueshape["trueshape_method"] == "dissolved"
print(gdf_trueshape.loc[dissolved_mask, "geometry"].geom_type.value_counts().to_string())
print()
print("Constituent count (all links):")
print(gdf_trueshape["n_constituents"].describe().round(1).to_string())
```

```{python}
#| eval: false
gdf_trueshape[gdf_trueshape["trueshape_method"] == "dissolved"].explore(
    column="FT_2027", tooltip=["A", "B", "FT_2027", "n_constituents", "trueshape_method"]
)
```
